item.title: Connect
item.description: If You’re Interested in: Artificial Intelligentce Game development Creative Coding Generative Art Robotic Let’s Build something Great together! Connect!

item.title: About Me
item.description: My name Theaveas So, A Interdisciplinary architect who interested in the intersection of Computational design, Artificial Intelligence, Architecture, and Robotic. I’m from Cambodia and finish my graduate program in China. 🌱 I’m currently learning and researching Reinforcement learning, Machine Learning, Deep Learning and Procedural Modeling to explore the possibilities of intelligences. 👨‍💻 All of my projects are available at https://github.com/theaveasso 💬 Happy to chat with you about topics related to Computational Design, AI, Cryptocurrencies, Blockchain and Life

item.title: Markov Decision Process (MDP)
item.description: An Introdution to Markov Decision Process, Summary from Introduction to Reinforcement Learning Sutton Bato, 2nd edition Chapter 3

item.title: Install Tensorflow on Mac M1 chip
